title: MikroTik SFP28 optical modules XS+2733LC15D, SM, 15km, 1/10/25G, pair
description: Kit contains two SFP+ modules that can be used as a pair to achieve operating data rate up to 25 Gbps for distances up to 15km on a single optical cable. SFP/ SFP+/ SFP28
